panels.title: Aggregate PnL (from start date) — All Strategies
panels.description: Portfolio real-time PnL vs benchmark from strategy inception. Y-axis shows rescaled weighted average of cumulative return across strategies present at each timestamp. Partial coverage periods show the weighted average of available strategies.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(cumulative_pnl) ELSE sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Production PnL` FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND ts IN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 FINAL WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND ts IN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 FINAL WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8))) WHERE ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND (strategy_table_name, toStartOfMinute(ts)) NOT IN (SELECT trace_text_paused_strategy_table, toStartOfMinute(event_ts_utc + INTERVAL n MINUTE) FROM analytics.strategy_pause_events ARRAY JOIN range(0, 5) AS n WHERE event_ts_utc BETWEEN toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE AND toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND '${hide_paused}' = '1') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(cumulative_pnl) ELSE sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Real Trade PnL` FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND ts IN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND ts IN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8))) WHERE ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND (strategy_table_name, toStartOfMinute(ts)) NOT IN (SELECT trace_text_paused_strategy_table, toStartOfMinute(event_ts_utc + INTERVAL n MINUTE) FROM analytics.strategy_pause_events ARRAY JOIN range(0, 5) AS n WHERE event_ts_utc BETWEEN toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE AND toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND '${hide_paused}' = '1') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(cumulative_pnl) ELSE sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Backtest PnL`, sum(benchmark * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) AS `Benchmark` FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR)) WHERE ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Aggregate PnL (from 0%) — All Strategies
panels.description: Portfolio real-time PnL vs benchmark rebased to 0% at the left edge of the selected time window. Production vs Backtest vs Benchmark. Uses period-over-period returns accumulated forward — absent strategies contribute 0 for that period, avoiding artificial drawdowns.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, sum(period_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Production PnL` FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(period_return * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(period_return) ELSE sum(period_return * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS period_pnl FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS period_return FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 FINAL WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR))) WHERE ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND (strategy_table_name, toStartOfMinute(ts)) NOT IN (SELECT trace_text_paused_strategy_table, toStartOfMinute(event_ts_utc + INTERVAL n MINUTE) FROM analytics.strategy_pause_events ARRAY JOIN range(0, 5) AS n WHERE event_ts_utc BETWEEN toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE AND toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND '${hide_paused}' = '1')) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time) ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(period_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Real Trade PnL` FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(period_return * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(period_return) ELSE sum(period_return * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS period_pnl FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS period_return FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR))) WHERE ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND (strategy_table_name, toStartOfMinute(ts)) NOT IN (SELECT trace_text_paused_strategy_table, toStartOfMinute(event_ts_utc + INTERVAL n MINUTE) FROM analytics.strategy_pause_events ARRAY JOIN range(0, 5) AS n WHERE event_ts_utc BETWEEN toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE AND toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND '${hide_paused}' = '1')) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time) ORDER BY time

WITH strat AS (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS period_return, benchmark - first_value(benchmark) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS period_bm_return FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 FINAL WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR)) WHERE ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) SELECT time, sum(period_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Backtest PnL`, sum(period_bm) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Benchmark` FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(period_return * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(period_return) ELSE sum(period_return * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS period_pnl, sum(period_bm_return * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) AS period_bm FROM strat WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY time UNION ALL SELECT (h - INTERVAL 59 MINUTE) + INTERVAL m MINUTE AS time, if(m = 59, period_pnl_hour, 0) AS period_pnl, period_bm_hour / 60.0 AS period_bm FROM (SELECT toStartOfHour(ts) AS h, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(period_return * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(period_return) ELSE sum(period_return * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS period_pnl_hour, sum(period_bm_return * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) AS period_bm_hour FROM strat WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY h) ARRAY JOIN range(60) AS m) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Portfolio Drawdown
panels.description: How far the entire portfolio has fallen from its peak. Production vs Backtest overlaid. Uses period-over-period returns to correctly compute drawdown for a dynamically-growing portfolio — new strategies joining at p=0 no longer create artificial drawdown.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, agg_pnl - max(agg_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Production Drawdown` FROM (SELECT time, sum(period_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS agg_pnl FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(period_return * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(period_return) ELSE sum(period_return * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS period_pnl FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS period_return FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 FINAL WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR))) WHERE ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND (strategy_table_name, toStartOfMinute(ts)) NOT IN (SELECT trace_text_paused_strategy_table, toStartOfMinute(event_ts_utc + INTERVAL n MINUTE) FROM analytics.strategy_pause_events ARRAY JOIN range(0, 5) AS n WHERE event_ts_utc BETWEEN toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE AND toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND '${hide_paused}' = '1')) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time)) ORDER BY time

SELECT time, agg_pnl - max(agg_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Real Trade Drawdown` FROM (SELECT time, sum(period_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS agg_pnl FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(period_return * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(period_return) ELSE sum(period_return * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS period_pnl FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS period_return FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR))) WHERE ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND (strategy_table_name, toStartOfMinute(ts)) NOT IN (SELECT trace_text_paused_strategy_table, toStartOfMinute(event_ts_utc + INTERVAL n MINUTE) FROM analytics.strategy_pause_events ARRAY JOIN range(0, 5) AS n WHERE event_ts_utc BETWEEN toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE AND toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND '${hide_paused}' = '1')) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time)) ORDER BY time

WITH strat AS (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS period_return, benchmark - first_value(benchmark) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS period_bm_return FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR)) WHERE ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) SELECT time, agg_pnl - max(agg_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Backtest Drawdown`, agg_bm - max(agg_bm) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Benchmark Drawdown` FROM (SELECT time, sum(period_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS agg_pnl, sum(period_bm) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS agg_bm FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(period_return * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(period_return) ELSE sum(period_return * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS period_pnl, sum(period_bm_return * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) AS period_bm FROM strat WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY time UNION ALL SELECT (h - INTERVAL 59 MINUTE) + INTERVAL m MINUTE AS time, if(m = 59, period_pnl_hour, 0) AS period_pnl, period_bm_hour / 60.0 AS period_bm FROM (SELECT toStartOfHour(ts) AS h, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(period_return * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(period_return) ELSE sum(period_return * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS period_pnl_hour, sum(period_bm_return * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) AS period_bm_hour FROM strat WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY h) ARRAY JOIN range(60) AS m)) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Total Portfolio PnL vs Benchmark
panels.description: The headline chart — entire portfolio as a single return curve. Production vs Backtest overlaid. Benchmark = weighted average of all underlying buy-and-hold returns. Uses period-over-period returns — absent strategies contribute 0 for that period.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, sum(period_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Production PnL` FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(period_return * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(period_return) ELSE sum(period_return * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS period_pnl FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS period_return FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 FINAL WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR))) WHERE ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND (strategy_table_name, toStartOfMinute(ts)) NOT IN (SELECT trace_text_paused_strategy_table, toStartOfMinute(event_ts_utc + INTERVAL n MINUTE) FROM analytics.strategy_pause_events ARRAY JOIN range(0, 5) AS n WHERE event_ts_utc BETWEEN toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE AND toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND '${hide_paused}' = '1')) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time) ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(period_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Real Trade PnL` FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(period_return * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(period_return) ELSE sum(period_return * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS period_pnl FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS period_return FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR))) WHERE ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND (strategy_table_name, toStartOfMinute(ts)) NOT IN (SELECT trace_text_paused_strategy_table, toStartOfMinute(event_ts_utc + INTERVAL n MINUTE) FROM analytics.strategy_pause_events ARRAY JOIN range(0, 5) AS n WHERE event_ts_utc BETWEEN toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE AND toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND '${hide_paused}' = '1')) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time) ORDER BY time

WITH strat AS (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS period_return, benchmark - first_value(benchmark) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS period_bm_return FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR)) WHERE ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) SELECT time, sum(period_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Backtest PnL`, sum(period_bm) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Benchmark` FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(period_return * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(period_return) ELSE sum(period_return * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS period_pnl, sum(period_bm_return * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) AS period_bm FROM strat WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY time UNION ALL SELECT (h - INTERVAL 59 MINUTE) + INTERVAL m MINUTE AS time, if(m = 59, period_pnl_hour, 0) AS period_pnl, period_bm_hour / 60.0 AS period_bm FROM (SELECT toStartOfHour(ts) AS h, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(period_return * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(period_return) ELSE sum(period_return * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS period_pnl_hour, sum(period_bm_return * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) AS period_bm_hour FROM strat WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY h) ARRAY JOIN range(60) AS m) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Aggregate Position — All Strategies
panels.description: Aggregated position across the entire portfolio. Aggregation follows the selected PnL mode.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(position * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(position) ELSE sum(position * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Production Position` FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 FINAL WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR))) WHERE ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND (strategy_table_name, toStartOfMinute(ts)) NOT IN (SELECT trace_text_paused_strategy_table, toStartOfMinute(event_ts_utc + INTERVAL n MINUTE) FROM analytics.strategy_pause_events ARRAY JOIN range(0, 5) AS n WHERE event_ts_utc BETWEEN toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE AND toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND '${hide_paused}' = '1') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(position * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(position) ELSE sum(position * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Real Trade Position` FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR))) WHERE ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND (strategy_table_name, toStartOfMinute(ts)) NOT IN (SELECT trace_text_paused_strategy_table, toStartOfMinute(event_ts_utc + INTERVAL n MINUTE) FROM analytics.strategy_pause_events ARRAY JOIN range(0, 5) AS n WHERE event_ts_utc BETWEEN toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE AND toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND '${hide_paused}' = '1') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(position * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(position) ELSE sum(position * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Backtest Position` FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR)) WHERE ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Strategy Count Over Time
panels.description: Number of distinct strategies contributing to PnL at each timestamp. Drops at hourly boundaries are expected (post-bar expansion delay for 1h strategies).

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, countDistinct(strategy_table_name) AS `Prod Strategies` FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 FINAL WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR))) WHERE ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND (strategy_table_name, toStartOfMinute(ts)) NOT IN (SELECT trace_text_paused_strategy_table, toStartOfMinute(event_ts_utc + INTERVAL n MINUTE) FROM analytics.strategy_pause_events ARRAY JOIN range(0, 5) AS n WHERE event_ts_utc BETWEEN toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE AND toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND '${hide_paused}' = '1') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, countDistinct(strategy_table_name) AS `Real Trade Strategies` FROM (SELECT strategy_table_name, strategy_id, strategy_name, underlying, config_timeframe, source, version, ts, cumulative_pnl, benchmark, position, price, final_signal, weighting, updated_at FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 FINAL INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR))) WHERE ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND (strategy_table_name, toStartOfMinute(ts)) NOT IN (SELECT trace_text_paused_strategy_table, toStartOfMinute(event_ts_utc + INTERVAL n MINUTE) FROM analytics.strategy_pause_events ARRAY JOIN range(0, 5) AS n WHERE event_ts_utc BETWEEN toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE AND toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) AND '${hide_paused}' = '1') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, countDistinct(strategy_table_name) AS `BT Strategies` FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 INNER JOIN (SELECT ts FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR) GROUP BY ts HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) AS complete USING (ts) WHERE ts < toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR)) WHERE ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

list.name: mode
list.label: PnL Mode
list.query: Rescaled : rescaled,Raw Weighted : raw_weighted,Equal Weighted : equal
list.description: Rescaled: sum(pnl*w)/sum(w) — normalized to 100%. Raw Weighted: sum(pnl*w) — actual portfolio contribution. Equal Weighted: avg(pnl) — every instance equal.

list.name: hide_paused
list.label: Hide Paused Strategies
list.description: Hide: exclude any (strategy, minute) within 5 min after a strategy_pause event. Show: include all data, including paused windows. Applies to Production and Real Trade only; Backtest is never filtered.
